scripts.db:push: cd packages/database && npx prisma@5 db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/database && npx prisma@5 migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd packages/database && npx prisma@5 migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:status: cd packages/database && npx prisma@5 migrate status
scripts.e2e:all: npm run e2e && npm run e2e:quikit
scripts.e2e:install: cd apps/quikscale && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
